title: Sanji Feeds a Starving Enemy
description: On pages 14–17, Sanji feeds Gin despite the danger, revealing that his compassion for the hungry matters more to him than restaurant rules or pirate labels.
scene: Gin arrives broken and starving, while the Baratie cooks judge him as an enemy; Sanji alone treats hunger as something that must be answered.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: don...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hmph.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Trying to earn some sympathy points?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey move it, Patty.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: here, gin. Give this to him.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey Sanji! Take that food back this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea what kind of man he is!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: The ruler of East Blue, the King of Decceptions! That's Don Krieg for you!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He started out by disgusting as a marine after escaping from prison!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He then killed the Marine Officer in charge of the ship and took it over!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's how he became a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Since then, he's attacked ports, towns, and other ships by hanging a marine flag...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And when attacking his enemies, he hangs a white flag to attack them by surprise...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's a man who'll stoop to anything in order to win!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And that's how he made his way to the top!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: His strength ain't no exaggeration either!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You really think he'll just leave after eating!? That's utterly impossible for him!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Letting a demon like him starve to death,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Is for the good of this world!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji!

summary: This part reveals the core of Sanji’s morality: no matter who a person is, he cannot ignore someone starving in front of him.
